zh.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: 英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu是Drogo de Monte Acuto和unknown的兒子，於大約1118年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古。他和Alice de Basset至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於大約1164年在英國薩默塞特布盧頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特布盧頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu是Drogo de Monte Acuto和unknown的儿子，于大约1118年出生在英国薩默塞特謝普頓 蒙塔古。他和Alice de Basset至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于大约1164年在英国薩默塞特布盧頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特布盧頓。

nameMeanings.name: Montagu
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu was born about 1118, in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England as the son of Drogo de Monte Acuto and unknown. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Alice de Basset. He died about 1164, in Bruton, Somerset, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Bruton, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu est né environ 1118, à Shepton Montague, Somerset, Angleterre, fils de Drogo de Monte Acuto et unknown. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Alice de Basset. Il est décédé environ 1164, à Bruton, Somerset, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Bruton, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu wurde um 1118 in Shepton Montague, Somerset, England, als Sohn von Drogo de Monte Acuto und unknown geboren. Er hatte mit Alice de Basset mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1164 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Bruton, Somerset, England und wurde in Bruton, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu è nato il circa 1118 nel Shepton Montague, Somerset, England come figlio di Drogo de Monte Acuto e unknown. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Alice de Basset. Morì circa 1164, nel Bruton, Somerset, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Bruton, Somerset, England.

ja.Shepton Montague, Somerset, England: イギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグー
ja.lifeSummary: Richard Montaguは約1118年にイギリスソメルセトシェプトン モンタグーでDrogo de Monte Acutoとunknownの息子として生まれた。彼はAlice de Bassetとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1164年にイギリスソメルセトブルトンで48歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu(은)는 대략 1118년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 몽아구에서 Drogo de Monte Acuto(와)과 unknown의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Alice de Basset(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1164년 영국 서머세트 브루턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 브루턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu nasceu aproximadamente 1118, em Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra filho de Drogo de Monte Acuto e unknown. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Alice de Basset. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1164, em Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu родился около 1118 г. в местности шептон монтагу, сомирсет, Англия. Его родителей звали Drogo de Monte Acuto и unknown. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Alice de Basset. Он умер около 1164 г. в местности брутон, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности брутон, сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Montagu nació aproximadamente 1118, en Shepton Montague, Somerset, Inglaterra como hijo de Drogo de Monte Acuto y unknown. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Alice de Basset. Murió aproximadamente 1164, en Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Bruton, Somerset, Inglaterra.
